title: Book of the Dead, Spell 47: Not Letting the Body Be Carried Off
source: Papyrus of Ani; Papyrus of Nu; various papyri
description: Spell 47 of the Egyptian Book of the Dead — the most extensive collection of funerary texts from any ancient civilization.
introduction: Spell 47 of the Egyptian Book of the Dead — the most extensive collection of funerary texts from any ancient civilization.

translation.text: From the Book of the Dead, Spell 47: 'Not Letting the Body Be Carried Off.' This spell empowered the deceased to navigate the dangers of the underworld and achieve eternal life among the gods. The full text was inscribed on papyrus and placed in the tomb.
